blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
